dataset_name: Heart and Lung Sounds Dataset Recorded from a Clinical Manikin using Digital Stethoscope (HLS-CMDS)
paper_title: Descriptor: Heart and Lung Sounds Dataset Recorded from a Clinical Manikin using Digital Stethoscope (HLS-CMDS)
dataset_source: Dataset DOI/PID 10.17632/8972jxbpmp; public HLS-CMDS dataset metadata also mirrored/indexed by dataset repositories.
data_type: Audio (.wav): heart sounds, lung sounds, mixed cardiopulmonary sounds, and source signals for mixed recordings
possible_use_in_fyp: Possible training/testing and evaluation dataset for cardiopulmonary sound separation; useful for Chapter 2 dataset, methodology, evaluation dataset, and research gap discussion.
access_status: Public dataset metadata recorded; dataset download/use should be handled manually before experiments.
notes: Keep paper DOI and dataset DOI separate. Paper citation DOI: 10.1109/IEEEDATA.2025.3566012. Dataset access DOI/PID: 10.17632/8972jxbpmp. Dataset provides individual and mixed recordings plus source heart/lung sounds for mixed recordings.

paper_title: Sound-Dr: Reliable Sound Dataset and Baseline Artificial Intelligence System for Respiratory Illnesses

access_status: Metadata recorded; access requires manual verification.
notes: Phase 7 metadata-only dataset record. Related paper decision: Maybe.

dataset_name: Heart Murmur Detection from Phonocardiogram Recordings: The George B. Moody PhysioNet Challenge 2022

notes: Phase 7 metadata-only dataset record. Related paper decision: Maybe.
